zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras於大約1095年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯馬可時，他的父親Robert "le Gros" IV de Bethune36歲，母親Alix de Peronne27歲。他與Clémence d'Oisy結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1142年在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內享年48歲，埋葬在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras于大约1095年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯馬可时，他的父亲Robert "le Gros" IV de Bethune36岁，母亲Alix de Peronne27岁。他与Clémence d'Oisy结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1142年在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內享年48岁，埋葬在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內。

nameMeanings.name: Bethune
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin); French (Béthune): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, Picardy, France, recorded in the 8th century in the Latin form Bitunia, probably an adjective (with villa understood) derived from the oblique form of an ancient Germanic personal name Betto, an assimilated form of Berto (see Bert ). See also Scottish Beaton .

variants.name: Beaton
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, France (see Bethune ). The Hebridean family of McBeth , hereditary physicians, adopted the surname Beaton in the 16th century.
English: from the Middle English personal name Beton, a diminutive of Bete, a pet form of Beatrice (see Beatrice ). Compare Beat .

variants.name: Bert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philibert, Pierre.
German, French, and Polish: from a short form of various compound personal names formed with ancient Germanic berht ‘bright, famous’ (see for example Bertram ).
English: from the Middle English female personal name Berte (Old French Berte, from ancient Germanic Berta ).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras was born about 1095, in Marck, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Robert "le Gros" IV de Bethune, was 36 and his mother, Alix de Peronne, was 27. He married Clémence d'Oisy. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1142, in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 48, and was buried in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras est né environ 1095, à Marck, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Robert "le Gros" IV de Bethune, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Alix de Peronne, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Clémence d'Oisy. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1142, à Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras um 1095 in Marck, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert "le Gros" IV de Bethune 36 und seine Mutter Alix de Peronne 27. Er hat Clémence d'Oisy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1142 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras è nato il circa 1095 nel Marck, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Robert "le Gros" IV de Bethune, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Alix de Peronne, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Clémence d'Oisy. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1142, nel Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arrasが約1095年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスマルックで生まれた時，父Robert "le Gros" IV de Bethuneは36歳，母Alix de Peronneは27歳であった。Clémence d'Oisyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1142年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスブeスウンで48歳で死去し，フランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスブeスウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras(이)가 대략 1095년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 마c크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert "le Gros" IV de Bethune(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Alix de Peronne(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Clémence d'Oisy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1142년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 브e툰에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 브e툰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras nasceu aproximadamente 1095, em Marck, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Robert "le Gros" IV de Bethune, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Peronne, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Clémence d'Oisy. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1142, em Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras родился около 1095 г. в местности маркк, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert "le Gros" IV de Bethune было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix de Peronne, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Clémence d'Oisy. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1142 г. в местности бeтун, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности бeтун, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras nació aproximadamente 1095, en Marck, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Robert "le Gros" IV de Bethune, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Alix de Peronne, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Clémence d'Oisy. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1142, en Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia.
